name: Fantasy Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 package (12 oz.) Baker's® Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart bowl or casserole, microwave the butter or margarine on HIGH for 1 minute or until melted. Add the sugar and milk. Mix well.
2. Microwave for an additional 5 minutes or until the mixture begins to boil, stirring after 3 minutes. Mix well and scrape the sides of the bowl. Continue microwaving for another 5 1/2 minutes. Stir again after 3 minutes.
3. Gradually stir in the chocolate chips until melted. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Pour into a lightly greased 9-inch square or 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
5. Cool at room temperature. Cut into squares. Makes about 3 pounds fudge.
